tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows marked elevation of creatinine, suggesting severe renal impairment, and mild hypoglycemia. There is also mild anemia (low hemoglobin and hematocrit) and low total CO₂, which may indicate metabolic acidosis. Platelet count is normal, but platelet distribution width is elevated, possibly reflecting platelet activation or variability. Immediate clinical evaluation for acute or chronic kidney disease and related complications is recommended.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provider Organization: Azienda Sanitaria Locale n° 7 Musei
